title: 5 Automation Tools That Replace Employees
hook: These 5 tools replaced a $4,000 a month employee. And most of them are free.
voiceoverScript: These five tools replaced a four thousand dollar a month employee. And most of them are free. First, n8n. Open source workflow builder. Connect any API, automate any process. I use it for every client. Second, Make dot com. Visual automations that non-technical people can actually understand. Perfect for small teams. Third, Zapier. The gateway drug of automation. Five minute setup, instant results. Fourth, Claude. Not just a chatbot. It writes proposals, analyzes data, and builds entire workflows from a single prompt. Fifth, Airtable. Your spreadsheet on steroids. Combine it with any of these tools and you have a full business operating system. Save this list. You'll need it.

scenes.label: n8n
scenes.text: Open source. Self-hosted. Connect any API. Free forever.

scenes.label: Make.com
scenes.text: Drag. Drop. Automate. Non-technical teams love this.

scenes.label: Zapier
scenes.text: Five minute setup. Instant results. The gateway drug.

scenes.label: Claude
scenes.text: Writes proposals. Analyzes data. Builds entire workflows.

scenes.label: Airtable
scenes.text: Spreadsheet on steroids. Your full business operating system.
